My Engineering Projects

M-Pesa Ticketing System

Full-stack payment integration for events using Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. Handles secure M-Pesa API transactions for Kenyan users.

Next.jsNode.jsMongoDBM-Pesa API

EESA Dashboard

Association management system for engineering students. Features member tracking, event management, and communication tools.

ReactExpressPostgreSQL

Salsa Rhythm App

A creative tracker for dance progress with video tutorials, progress logging, and community features.

React NativeFirebaseNode.js

Built with Next.js & Tailwind CSS
